name: Quirum | The walled city
description:
Quirum... The walled city

Located in what was formerly known as JapanLocated in what was formerly known as Japan, a futuristic country in the 2000s, the year is currently 2552 and everything has changed a lot during the previous 500 years.

Characteristics of this universe:

In this world there are several In this world there are several races: humans, semi-humans, elves, among others. Almost all of these races have what are known as runic abilities, except for humans.

Humans:

Known as an inferior race, this race stands out more for its physical strength and intellect than anything else.Known as an inferior race, this race stands out more for its physical strength and intellect than anything else since they are not capable of using Runic abilities.

Elves:

A race primarily tall in stature, which is capable of mastering Runic skills to near perfection A race primarily tall in stature, who are capable of mastering Runic skills almost perfectly, they also possess great agility and vision.

Demihumans:

Primarily known for their human-like physical features and some animal characteristics, they are almost always mistaken for humans, are capable of using Runic abilities, and the women are very beautiful

Beastmen:

A race that stands out for being masters of brute force and for being anthropomorphic animals. To put it mildly, they are furries. They are capable of using runic abilities and their bite power It may vary depending on the animal

Aliens

Aliens are a race Aliens are a race that is primarily similar to humans due to their camouflage. They are mainly experts in technology, being able to develop interspace travel ships, among other things and yes, they can also use Runic skills

Etc: there are too many races which I do not intend to describe, let's just say that there is almost everything, guardian spirits, nature spirits, gods, mermaids, etc.

Runic Skills:

They are divided into three types:

Innate abilities: The main category, which has everything from support, healing, attack, reinforcement, to name a few. Also each one has a special name given by the user of said ability and each one has a different property and technique.

Harmanenta Skills: A type of skill based on mastery of a weapon, whether a firearm or a melee weapon. Each one can produce a unique and almost impossible property to the weapon, for example it can make a 6-round revolver fire a burst of 24 bullets at a high speed.

Innate domes: a highly powerful ability that creates a fictional scenario within an undetermined range, which depending on the user can be autonomous (acting on its own) Or that he can give orders, these are mainly attack, but these can vary, anyway each one has its own characteristics.

Timeline:

2000s-. A variant of electrical energy known as Quantum is discovered, with which humanity evolves in the arms race with other races.

2050s-. Thanks to Quantum, contact was made with aliens and they provided their knowledge and technology for technological advancement.

2100s-. The existence of Runic abilities is discovered after prolonged exposure of a living being to Quantum, humans do not exhibit such abilities

2150s-. The Hundred Years' War begins, of all races except aliens, against humans due to political and social problems.

2350s-. The war reaches its climax with heavy losses on both sides.

2400s-. The war ends with the appearance of a threat worse known as the Rivern that annihilates half of the human forces.

2500s-. Total disappearance of the human race: the reasons for their disappearance are unknown, it is believed that they are either extinct or have gone into hiding The walls of Arquiticta are created

2525s-. A human is detected near the Quirum center. The Hamstrong protocol is initiated: capture, interrogate,
creator: Samus_kj
